assertions.assertion: Output contains configuration of ForwardedHeaders with either ForwardedHeaders.XForwardedProto or the ASPNETCORE_FORWARDEDHEADERS_ENABLED environment variable approach
assertions.rationale: Shows explicit ForwardedHeadersOptions with XForwardedProto and mentions ASPNETCORE_FORWARDEDHEADERS_ENABLED as alternative

assertions.assertion: Output mentions that the ForwardedHeaders middleware must run before IdentityServer middleware in the pipeline
assertions.rationale: Explicitly states 'ForwardedHeaders middleware MUST run before IdentityServer middleware' and shows UseForwardedHeaders() before UseIdentityServer()

assertions.assertion: Output includes adding proxy IP addresses to KnownProxies or KnownNetworks for production, or explains the default localhost-only trust
assertions.rationale: Shows KnownProxies.Add() with example IP and explains default localhost-only trust: 'By default, ASP.NET Core only trusts proxies on localhost'

assertions.assertion: If explicit configuration is shown, ForwardedHeaders option includes XForwardedProto (to fix the http vs https issue)
assertions.rationale: Shows ForwardedHeaders.XForwardedProto in the explicit configuration
